shipit_checklist_issues.title: [Unite-Hub] Shipit Checklist
shipit_checklist_issues.description:
Shipit Checklist for Unite-Hub

Acceptance criteria:
- Current state captured with repo/path/branch/head evidence.
- Blockers and missing integrations/env/hooks listed without secret values.
- Test/build/typecheck status captured or exact missing command recorded.
- Sandbox-ready PR task exists for each executable remediation.
- Rana listed as final production merge authority.
- Done only after evidence artifact is linked.
